title: The Silent Burnout
author: Anonymous
content: I realized that staying late wasn't making me a better developer; it was just making me a tired one. Setting boundaries saved my career.

title: Architecting for Growth
author: System_Dev
content: Moving from junior to senior isn't about code complexity; it's about how well you communicate your architecture to the team.

title: The Power of One Voice
author: Derrick
content: In our latest 'Chama' meeting, we realized that transparency in penalties improved attendance by 40%. Consistency matters.
